counters.description: my perma ban champ. spell shield negates your q and a target on your r. a good morg you are made almost useless.
annoying range, best thing i can say is dodge skill shots and u win
you having slow movement speed allows u to be run down by this animal, its rarely picked, just respect it
insane range and lots of utility, you win all in but poke is slightly favored to him.
she does out damage you early in longer trades, aim to use bush to land  e auto and back to bush to avoid her trading back.
careful of his point and click root respect his distance and try to play for poke abusing vision.
champ is annoying to play against it. super safe pick you can rarely kill him the lane is not hard, you just need to make sure to hit him 1st or 2nd with r so he can not cleanse his teammates.
similar to maokai but worse because he can have health u, respect his point and click stun, play with bush vision
dodge his pull, ignite him when he r's and buy anti heal
extreme range and outpokes you, the best thing u can do is dodge. could be considered extreme because of this range difference.
you need to be very aggressive pre-level 6 or his r will negate ur w
gross range her plants block q. i perma ban morg or zyra
deletes your r from the game. it can be outplayed. if it's adc play away from the wave so he can't dash minion to minion and then on you.
she deletes your r from the game, most samira's use their w part of their combo so wait for that and then u should be fine. just be smart with your cool downs

synergies.description: excellent cc chain and has a similar movement speed, as well as ashe's slow allowing both of you to peel each other. my favorite adc to play with.
good cc chain and similar movement speed
your w is a samira's dream, but she does leave u behind when she perma dashes in
jinx loves the attack speed and movement speed you give her, but once she gets excited she leaves u behind making it hard to peel
u peel he space glides works well.
kaisa in lane wants engage so you need to be aggressive but it depends on support matchup how aggressive you can be
q into trap
nothing amazing or bad about them together just play safe and let him scale well keeping him alive.
similar to samira they like ur shielding as well
the movement speed is nice
will dive in away from u as long as u press w before she does ur good, hard to peel her.
she loves the attack speed and ms from your w and the ult combo is great. but she like jinx tend to run away from you with that high movement speed
